name: Gavrik Ironshield
sd_appearance: Standing tall at 8 feet, a Warforged named Gavrik Ironshield strides through the dimly lit streets of the Undercity. His body, though mechanical, carries an unnerving resemblance to a human, hinting at a complex origin. Gunmetal armor covers his muscular form, worn but expertly maintained, gleaming faintly under the flickering gas lamps. Twin red gems nestled in his helmet cast a soft, eerie glow. He wears a deep burgundy and gunmetal coat, the subtle Iron Fang mark etched on the lapel. Two daggers hang from his waist, a sling slung over one shoulder, and he dons a practical leather coat. A distinctive visual detail is the intricate mechanical wristwatch, its hands ticking away relentlessly, a reminder of his relentless pursuit for redemption as a loyal member of the Iron Fang Consortium.
faction_visual: deep burgundy and gunmetal coat, Iron Fang mark subtle on lapel, always armed
style_note: practical street clothes, nothing that slows movement, worn boots
